tracks.rawText: 4:38Do You Hear Me Girlv5.5CoverIndie pop with funk and disco influences, Clean electric guitar plays a rhythmic, palm-muted sixteenth-note pattern, A second electric guitar enters with a bright, chorused tone playing syncopated staccato chords, The bass guitar performs a melodic, walking line with frequent slides and octave jumps, Drums feature a tight, dry snare and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, Male vocals are delivered in a mid-range tenor with occasional shifts into a breathy falsetto, The arrangement includes a prominent instrumental break featuring a wah-wah filtered guitar solo and a syncopated cowbell, 115 BPM, E Major, 4/4 time1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Do You Hear Me Girl
